arabic: يَسْتَلْزِمُ التَّخْطِيطُ لِرِحْلَةٍ إِلَى مَنَاطِقِ النِّزَاعَاتِ دِرَاسَةً مُعَمَّقَةً لِلْأَوْضَاعِ الْأَمْنِيَّةِ وَالتَّشَاوُرَ مَعَ الْجِهَاتِ الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةِ الْمَعْنِيَّةِ.
translation: Planiranje putovanja u konfliktne zone zahtijeva temeljito proučavanje sigurnosnih prilika i savjetovanje s nadležnim diplomatskim tijelima.
translationEn: Planning a trip to conflict zones requires in-depth study of the security situation and consultation with the relevant diplomatic authorities.
